case_title: JOHN MARTIN VS. PELLIGRINO LANDSCAPE, A BUSINESS ENTITY FORM et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JOHN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN MARTIN'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED FROM AUG-04-2014 TO AUGUST 13, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 4, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: JOHN STEWART, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302/JKS)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF JOHN MARTIN's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is continued to August 13, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 4, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied.
